pill.$description: Pill geometry — consumed by status pills, follow-up question chips, trend chips, suggestion chips, count badges, recent-search chips. Kept at the component tier (not promoted to semantic) because the values are pill-shaped-thing geometry, not a general design intent. The point is shared geometry across all pill-shaped components, not card-specific styling.

padding-block-dense.$description: Tighter variant for dense rows or in-card adornments.

dot-size.$description: Status dot inside a pill (success/warning/error/info indicator).

icon-pill.$description: Rounded-square tone-tinted glyph holder. Used by sprout-cards, any future identity-bearing tag. Background is tone-derived (via --card-tone-tint-strong at runtime), so only geometry lives here.

radius.$description: Slightly softer than the chip pill — reads as a 'stamp', not a square.

size-compact.$description: Used at Seed stage and at narrow container-query widths.

glyph-stroke.$description: Slightly heavier than 1px so glyphs read on phones.
